nasb.text: And you will know that I am the Lord, when I bring you into the land of Israel, into the land which I swore to give to your forefathers.

esv.text: And you shall know that I am the Lord, when I bring you into the land of Israel, the country that I swore to give to your fathers.

cnv.text: 我領你們進入以色列地，就是進入我曾經舉手起誓要賜給你們祖先的地以後，你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要把你们带回我起誓应许给你们祖先的以色列，这样你们就知道我是耶和华。
